message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-mcp-tool-capabilities): pin McpToolListEntry + McpToolCallRequest + McpServerCapabilities matrix wire format (resolves flywheel_connectors-dfpyd)

21 tests pinning the MCP tools/list + tools/call surface plus the
server-capabilities matrix advertised during initialize.

- McpServerCapabilities::default == with_tools() (just-tools is the
  documented default advertisement)
- with_tools() sets tools.list_changed=Some(true), leaves
  resources/prompts/logging None
- full() advertises every capability (tools+resources+prompts+
  logging) with list_changed + resource subscribe
- has_tools/has_resources/has_prompts predicates reflect Option
  presence
- listChanged camelCase at every level (tools / resources / prompts);
  None capabilities omitted from JSON
- McpToolCapability list_changed→listChanged + omit-when-None →
  '{}'
- McpLoggingCapability empty struct serializes to '{}'
  (presence-indicator pattern)
- McpClientCapabilities sampling+roots both skip-when-None → '{}'
- McpToolListRequest cursor skip-when-None → '{}'
- McpToolListEntry: input_schema → 'inputSchema' camelCase; name +
  inputSchema required; description + annotations skip-when-None;
  full roundtrip
- McpToolListResponse next_cursor → 'nextCursor' camelCase + skip-
  when-None
- McpToolCallRequest: name required; arguments serde(default) →
  Null when absent; arbitrary serde_json::Value payloads preserved

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
